name: 10pc Nylon Kitchen Utensil Set Gray - Figmint™
description:
This 10-Piece Kitchen Utensil Set from Figmint™ is an ideal pick for refreshing your kitchen or gifting to a new homeowner. This set includes a slotted spoon, ladle, turner, spoon, pasta spoon, two spatulas, tongs, and a slotted turner. Made of nylon, these utensils feature built-in holes for easy hanging from a peg or screw. Plus, they resist heat up to 450°F and are dishwasher safe for added convenience.

Figmint™: Mixing up a taste of adventure every day.
